title: alchemilla alpina f. pallens
intro: Alchemilla alpina f. pallens, also known as the Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla alpina f. pallens include reducing swelling and pain, treating wounds and skin irritations, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
